failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id, 
    p.username, 
    p.full_name, 
    ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'sushi')) AS rank
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'sushi')
ORDER BY rank DESC
LIMIT 10;
